{
    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "4, ['Offering Premium Subscription for future trip discounts and priority support', 'Offering Virtual Personal Assistant service for managing restaurant reservations and plans', 'Offering Cultural & Dining Coordination Enhancement or Program as an upsell package', 'Requesting confirmation to include optional upgrade services unrelated to flights/accommodation/activities/dining fields (i.e., premium upsells)']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "12, ['Providing multiple destination options with cost breakdowns (Prague, Budapest, Athens, Vienna)', 'Providing flight options with total cost and class (economy, direct, baggage included)', 'Providing accommodation details including star rating, breakfast, Wi-Fi, parking, and cost per night', 'Providing activity details such as Old Town Walking Tour with duration, guide included, and price', 'Providing dining recommendations including restaurant type, cuisine, price per person, dietary accommodations', 'Providing total package cost and budget compliance', 'Providing booking confirmation number and status', 'Providing cancellation and refund policy details', 'Providing travel dates and availability (June 10–14, 2024)', 'Providing family traveler composition (2 adults + 2 children) relevant to group size fields', 'Providing dietary requirements (vegetarian, gluten-free, Indian & Mediterranean accommodated)', 'Providing request for confirmation to finalize booking within given budget']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>
